problem_statement: Operators need a borrowed Verified, Implemented, and Specified capability maturity label projection that improves scanability without replacing the existing C0-C7 evidence ladder or granting production authority.
success_criteria: Capability maturity assessments expose a derived maturity_label field
C0, C1, and C2 map only to Specified
C3, C4, and C5 map only to Implemented
C6 and C7 map only to Verified
Schema validation rejects a maturity_label that overclaims the maturity_level
Gateway read models expose maturity_label and maturity label counts without mutating registry entries
Operator console output shows the label beside the C-level
Existing production_ready and autonomy_ready gates continue to rely on C-level evidence only
non_goals: no replacement of the C0-C7 capability maturity ladder
constraints: maturity_label must be derived from maturity_level
Verified must be impossible below C6
read models must remain observational and side-effect free
all schema and runtime errors must be explicit
evidence_required: workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
